# Template Gallery
Front end components used for template galleries [In App] and on the [Marketing Site].


## Storybook
This project uses storybook for local development.  
To run the project locally, run `yarn start`  
Master can be found at: https://master-dot-template-gallery-dot-lp-lds.appspot.com/

[Marketing Site]: https://leadpages.com/templates-1
[In App]: https://my.leadpages.net/#/pages/templates
